## Type of change

<!-- Check what applies. -->

- [ ] New example
- [ ] Bug fix (existing example)

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes for the affected example(s)
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavioural changes
- [ ] Updated the example's `README.md` if its behaviour/contract changed

<!-- Design tradeoffs, follow-ups, sample output, anything to look at closely. -->
